confidence_bands.label: canonical_or_primary_traditional
confidence_bands.description: Classical/traditional source with clear provenance or accepted institutional source.

confidence_bands.label: regionally_accepted
confidence_bands.description: Accepted regional Panchang/Panchangam source with identifiable tradition and use-context.

confidence_bands.label: modern_study_or_cross_verification
confidence_bands.description: Research, comparative study or modern explanation useful for methodology/cross-checking.

confidence_bands.label: editorial_style_reference
confidence_bands.description: Useful for explanation style or language discipline, not automatically authoritative for calculation.

confidence_bands.label: under_editorial_verification
confidence_bands.description: Potential source not yet verified enough for seed data or public-facing claim.

confidence_bands.label: blocked_or_unsuitable
confidence_bands.description: Viral, unsourced, contradictory, spam, sensational, or reputation-risk source.
